message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false

class ItemViews << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  create_item()
  get_item()
  catalog()
  get_category()
  submit_offer()
  search()
  get_all_sales()
  get_sale()
}

note right of ItemViews
All sales for the logged in user
Both where he is buyer and seller.
end note

class UserViews << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  frontpage()
  register()
  profile()
  update_profile()
}

class MessagingViews << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  send_message()
  get_all_messages()
  get_message()
}
@enduml
